title: API: case sub-resource endpoints return 200 for non-existent cases instead of 404
description: GET /api/cases/9999999999999999/emails returns 200 with {"emails":[],"total":0} for a non-existent case, while GET /api/cases/9999999999999999 correctly returns 404. Sub-resource endpoints (emails, notes, teams, etc.) should also return 404 if the parent case doesn't exist, for API consistency.
